phrases.text_local: Scusi, da quale banchina parte la linea dodici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, da KWAH-leh BAN-kee-na PAR-teh la lee-NEH-ah DOH-dee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando parte il prossimo vaporetto per Murano, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-do PAR-teh il PROS-see-mo va-po-RET-to per Moo-RAH-no, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un biglietto ACTV, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-to COS-ta oon bee-LYET-to ACTV, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-da il bee-LYET-to, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Alle macchinette gialle prima di salire.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh PREE-mah DEE sah-LEE-reh
likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machines before boarding.

responses.english: At the yellow machines before boarding.
responses.phonetic: AHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh PREE-mah DEE sah-LEE-reh
responses.french: Alle macchinette gialle prima di salire.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è la direzione per San Michele, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwal eh la dee-reh-TSYO-neh per San mee-KEH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un parcheggio taxi acqueo qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon par-KET-joh TAK-see ak-KWEH-o kwee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, right here at the dock.

responses.english: Yes, right here at the dock.
